label: Wetlab Validation (Bioactivity)
description: Perform enzymatic bioactivity assay to validate predicted IC50 values for synthesized compounds.

defaultOutputs.name: Measured IC50 (nM)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Experimentally measured IC50 from DPP-4 enzymatic assay.

defaultOutputs.name: Prediction Error (%)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Percent error between predicted and measured IC50.

defaultOutputs.name: Validation Status
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Pass / Fail / Review based on activity threshold.

configSchema.label: Assay Type
configSchema.tooltip: Select the wetlab assay protocol to validate bioactivity.

configSchema.label: Activity Threshold (IC50 nM)
configSchema.tooltip: IC50 cutoff to classify compounds as Pass.
